description: The FootstepSoundDefinition component can be referenced by other components which can trigger this to play noise during footstep events.

fields.ParentUnder: The slot to parent played sounds under.
fields.MinDistance: The minimum distance the audio can be heard from before playing at maximum amount.
fields.MaxDistance: The max distance before the audio cannot be heard anymore.
fields.RolloffMode: How played audio should fall off based on distance.
fields.Clips: Different footsteps that can play when this component is triggered

usage: Used to play sound when footsteps happen on surfaces or it receives a footstep event.
